WHY OLIVE PEOPLE

Korean beauty for real everyday life.

We want to make excellent Korean beauty products easier to find in Jordan without making customers feel that good skincare must be complicated.

OLIVE PEOPLE focuses on authentic products, clear information and a welcoming offline experience.
